hero.title: Join Mōchirīī
hero.intro: Mōchirīī is a quiet, active Where Winds Meet home for people who enjoy relaxed company, simple coordination, and friendly chat. Join through Discord, share your in-game name and time zone, learn the guild rhythm, and step into events when you feel ready.

steps.title: The Joining Path
intro: These steps get you from first hello to your first smooth run. Leaders handle setup; you bring your in-game name, time zone, and a little patience while roles are assigned.

items.title: Enter the Hall
items.description: Join Discord and let a mod know you are here for the Where Winds Meet guild. Verification opens the wider server, and the WWM guild section appears after the proper role is assigned. If you feel stuck, DM a mod or ask in game.

items.title: Read the Codex & Ranks
items.description: Skim the Codex and Ranks pages so you know our tone, basic etiquette, leadership path, and how support works.

items.title: Share your IGN & time zone
items.description: Post your in-game name and time zone so leaders can match you with the right channels, roles, and event windows. Mōchirīī is global, so clear time zones help everyone avoid guesswork.

items.title: Receive your starting rank
items.description: A leader assigns your starting rank and points you to the channels, roles, and weekly notes that matter first.

items.title: Join an event
items.description: Pick an upcoming event, RSVP if planning is needed, and show up when you can. Ask questions early so the run starts calmly.

quickStart.title: Quick Start
body: Join Discord, request WWM access, and post your IGN plus time zone.
Read the Codex, then RSVP to an upcoming event if your schedule allows. Presence builds familiarity fast, and questions are welcome.

culture.title: Expectations & Culture
intro: Mōchirīī stays comfortable through courtesy, consistent effort & clear communication. Skill grows over time. Conduct shows up immediately.

cards.title: Respect & kindness
cards.description: Keep chat welcoming, assume good intent & treat every member as someone you may run with for a long time.

cards.title: Activity rhythm
cards.description: Participation stays flexible. Consistent presence, RSVPs for planned runs, and clear notice during breaks matter more than marathon sessions.

cards.title: Helping new members
cards.description: Questions belong here. Veterans share tips, builds & mechanics with patience. Leaders step in when guidance helps.

cards.title: Events & updates
cards.description: Events and announcements live in Discord as well as on the website, with pinned notes for clarity. RSVP early when asked and follow any posted requirements.

notes.title: Notes
body: Voice chat is optional unless an event post says otherwise. Discord is the clearest place for roles, announcements, and coordination.
Need a break? Tell a leader before a longer Cupcake nap so roles and expectations stay clear.
If you feel lost, tag a leader. Getting unstuck fast keeps the game fun.
